dataHeroStaffArgumentation.title: Custom software development
dataHeroStaffArgumentation.subtitle: Specialized personnel to boost your projects
dataHeroStaffArgumentation.description:
Strengthen your operations with our staff augmentation service designed based on experience, analysis, and understanding of your business. At Heinsohn, we have technical teams tailored to your objectives, integrating experts in software development, QA, data, architecture, and artificial intelligence.



Optimize costs, scale capabilities, and accelerate your deliveries with a flexible, transparent model aligned with your time zones.



+45 years of experience in enterprise technological solutions.



Multidisciplinary teams ready to integrate into your operations.

StaffArgumentation1.title:
When your team needs to grow,

IT Staff Augmentation is the

answer
StaffArgumentation1.description:
Companies need to scale with agility and precision, but traditional recruitment is usually slow and expensive. Our IT Staff Augmentation model allows you to reinforce your team without resorting to traditional outsourcing schemes.



Symptoms of inefficient IT staffing management:

cards1.description: Slow processes due to a lack of specialized technical resources
Difficulty covering critical or temporary roles
High costs in hiring and talent retention
Loss of strategic focus due to administrative tasks

StaffArgumentation1.bottomText: With Heinsohn, you optimize costs, eliminate bottlenecks, and access talent that accelerates your projects from day one.
StaffArgumentation1.bottomBtn: Schedule your diagnostic session and get to know available profiles

title6.title:
This is how we build your ideal IT team,

step by step

highlight.description: You incorporate specialized talent that works under your direction and processes, with selection, hiring, and administrative management support from Heinsohn.

metrics.description: 100% remote or hybrid depending on the required location.

items.textos: Java (Spring Boot), Node.js, Python (FastAPI/Django) and .NET Core.
MERN, MEAN and Java + React/Angular combinations.
Swift, Kotlin, React Native and Flutter.
Creation of robust and scalable testing frameworks.
Functional, regression, performance (JMeter) and initial security testing.
Kubernetes (K8s), Terraform, Docker, CI/CD Pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins).
DevSecOps, IAM, compliance (SOC2/HIPAA compliance support), Pentesting.
Product Designers, UX Researchers, Service Design (Figma, Adobe XD)..
Project Managers, Scrum Masters, Delivery Managers.
Functional and business analysts with a focus on technical requirements.
Snowflake, Databricks, dbt, Apache Airflow, Spark.
LLM Engineering (LangChain, OpenAI API), Vector Databases (Pinecone), RAG Architecture.
Business Intelligence (Power BI, Tableau), Analytics Engineering.
Software, Cloud, Data and Enterprise Solutions.
Tech Leads, VP of Engineering, fractional or permanent CTOs.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Is it a single software or several different solutions?

answer.descriptions: Our staff augmentation model allows you to access a wide range of specialized profiles, from individual developers to complete squads, all tailored to your specific project needs.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: What entities can use this IT staffing service?

answer.descriptions: Our service is designed to support any organization, from startups to large corporations, that needs to accelerate its digital transformation or scale its technical capacity.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Does the service adapt to the regulations of each country in LATAM?

answer.descriptions: Yes, we handle all the legal and administrative complexity. We ensure that our staffing model complies with local labor laws, tax requirements, and privacy regulations in each country where we operate.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Can I implement only a few modules and scale later?

answer.descriptions: Of course. Our model is highly flexible, allowing you to start with a single specialist and expand your team as your project or business grows.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Does the service cover pension payroll and mass payments?

answer.descriptions: While our staff augmentation is primarily for technical roles, we can provide teams specialized in enterprise software support and maintenance that handle these critical systems.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Does it also work to manage voluntary pension savings or VPS?

answer.descriptions: Yes, we provide experts who can integrate into your existing financial systems to manage modules like VPS, ensuring continuous development and security.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Can it be used to manage severance pay from the same system?

answer.descriptions: Our staff can help you develop, update, or maintain the modules required to manage severance pay, ensuring they are fully functional and integrated within your core platform.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: Is the service multi-country and multi-currency?

answer.descriptions: Yes, our staffing model is designed to support international operations, with the capability to manage talent and projects across different countries and currencies seamlessly.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: What type of support does Heinsohn offer?

answer.descriptions: Heinsohn offers 360° support, including talent management, continuous training, administrative oversight, and a dedicated account manager to ensure project success.

dataPreguntasFrecuentesStaff.question: How to start the implementation of the IT staffing service?

answer.descriptions: Starting is simple. Contact us for a personalized diagnostic session, where we will analyze your needs, define the necessary profiles, and start the integration process immediately.
